name: BSP Circular 1112 — Model Risk Management Guidelines
summary: Requires BSFIs to establish model risk management frameworks including model inventory, validation, documentation, and lifecycle governance.
requirements: Maintain comprehensive model inventory with risk tiering
Independent model validation (separate from development team)
Standardized model documentation including assumptions and limitations
Ongoing performance monitoring with defined thresholds
Model approval workflows with senior management sign-off
Annual model risk assessment and reporting to the board
penalties: BSP enforcement actions including memoranda of understanding, cease-and-desist orders, and monetary penalties for governance failures identified during examination.

sasCapabilityMapping.specificFeature: Centralized model registry with automated risk classification
Validation workflow engine with challenger model comparison
Auto-generated model cards and documentation templates
Real-time drift detection with automated alerting
Configurable approval chains with full audit trail

competitivePositioning: Most competitors (Databricks, open-source MLflow) provide basic model registries but lack the governance depth required by BSP 1112. SAS Model Manager is purpose-built for regulated industries with pre-configured validation frameworks.
talkingPoints: BSP examiners specifically look for model governance during BSFI examinations
SAS Model Manager provides BSP 1112-aligned workflows out-of-the-box
Databricks/MLflow require significant custom development for regulatory governance
Champion/challenger testing is built-in — not an add-on or custom code
Full audit trail satisfies BSP documentation requirements automatically
